name: Golden Glow Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the lemon gelatin in 1 cup of boiling water. Add 1 cup cold water, salt, cayenne pepper, and a scant tablespoon of vinegar. Refrigerate until partially set.
2. Mix in the drained crushed pineapple, shredded carrots, and chopped pecans. Stir well.
3. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours until firm. Cut into squares and serve on lettuce leaves.
